form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished last in a Grade 4/5 on March 31 over 400m at Warragul behind Paw Gusto beaten 7 lengths (23.05). Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

form.formComment: Won again in quick time after leading claiming her three straight wins at Sandown over 515m (29.24). Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Bendigo over 425m in 24.01. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fifth over 425m at Bendigo at Grade 4/5 level. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors two back when third (18.25) over 305m at Mt Gambier. Awkwardly drawn but is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Warrnambool (23.08) in a Bottom Up - Grade 5, finishing a 9 length sixth. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed four times. Looks a place chance at best.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Shepparton over 450m. Can't make much of a case this time.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Bendigo over 425m in 23.91 last start, beating This Black Duck. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Geelong to win by 0.8 lengths in 26.17, beating Ivory Narwhal. Last start finished 7th on March 15 over 300m at Healesville behind Crackerjack Matt beaten 9 lengths (16.90) in a Grade 4/5. Other runners look much more appealing.

form.formComment: Most recently finished 7th over 390m at Shepparton beaten 6 lengths (23.14) behind Rolling Express in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 4. Can make amends. Worth including.
